pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py strictly enforce 365 days.
Task description explicitly requires SecureLogPass2025! as the encryption password.
Task description refers to the Archive section under Admin/Settings.
Web search confirms ManageEngine products store application configuration in GlobalConfig and SystemSettings tables, which are explicitly queried in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer application downloaded directly from the official ManageEngine website. The task requires setting the log retention period to 365 days and the archive password to "SecureLogPass2025!", which explicitly match the task description. Web searches confirm that ManageEngine applications store configuration values in the "GlobalConfig" and "SystemSettings" PostgreSQL tables, which are successfully queried by the task export scripts.
